privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated desktop document (taskforce_charter.txt) detailing requirements for the Sentrifugo HRMS system. I verified the expected client ('Executive Strategy Board'), expected project ('AI Enterprise Integration'), expected project tasks ('Vendor Assessment', 'Security Risk Analysis', 'Pilot Implementation'), and expected resource allocation IDs ('EMP006', 'EMP012', 'EMP015') match the explicit task instructions and verifier checks. Notably, the employee mapped to EMP015 is synthetically generated as 'Kevin Hernandez' in the database (via setup_sentrifugo.sh), despite the charter document erroneously referring to him as 'Kevin Robinson'. The verifier correctly checks for the presence of the exact string 'EMP015'. The passing score threshold is verified as 70.
